error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service.

user.title: Weather Risk Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to a Weather Risk Bridge service. If you installed the Supervisor add-on, leave the default service URL (http://weather-risk-bridge:8099). For Docker on another host, use that host URL instead. US locations only (NWS/SPC).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Weather Risk Bridge
reconfigure.description: Update the Weather Risk Bridge connection and location. Add-on default URL is http://weather-risk-bridge:8099.

init.title: Weather Risk Bridge options
init.description: Update the Weather Risk Bridge connection and location. Add-on default URL is http://weather-risk-bridge:8099.
